domains.title: Onboarding & first-run setup
domains.rationale: All default-pack seeds are correctly created in scheduled state with appropriate logs, meeting the journey expectations.

domains.title: Core data model & overview surface
domains.rationale: All documented task kinds reached the expected scheduled state with correct log entries

domains.title: Habits
domains.rationale: The habit reminder completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output task as its onComplete child

domains.title: Routines & multi-step daily flows
domains.rationale: All terminal statuses and pipeline relationships match the described multi-step flow

domains.title: Tasks (one-off)
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with correct reason and timing rules allow early completion; all required fields are present.

domains.title: Goals
domains.rationale: The watcher was correctly scheduled with the quiet_hours gate and remains in the scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Reminders & escalation ladder
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder correctly remains a single scheduled task without premature escalation tasks, adhering to lazy ladder evaluation rules.

domains.title: Calendar journeys
domains.rationale: The recap task was correctly skipped and its onSkip followup was created and scheduled as expected.

domains.title: Inbox & email triage
domains.rationale: The output task reached completed status with correct terminal state and log entries

domains.title: Travel
domains.rationale: The approval task completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output child as defined by the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Follow-up repair (relationships)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed as expected after the subject update within the lookback window, with correct terminal status and log entries.

domains.title: Documents, signatures, portals
domains.rationale: The reminder correctly transitioned to failed and spawned a scheduled followup as defined by the onFail pipeline.

domains.title: Self-control / app & website blockers
domains.rationale: The task correctly evaluated the travel gate, fired, and reached the expected terminal status with appropriate log entries.

domains.title: Group chat handoff
domains.rationale: The custom watcher task is correctly created with the specified properties and remains in the scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Multi-channel & cross-channel search
domains.rationale: The task was correctly scheduled with the required contextRequest and appropriate terminal status.

domains.title: Activity signals & screen context
domains.rationale: The task completed via the health signal completion check within the lookback window, and all terminal states and logs are correct.

domains.title: Approval queues & action gating
domains.rationale: The approval task was correctly scheduled and dismissed with the expected terminal status and log entries.

domains.title: Identity merge (canonical person)
domains.rationale: The watcher reached completed status with correct terminal state and log entries, adhering to optional firedAt semantics.

domains.title: Memory recall
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the required output configuration and no errors in the log; no further actions were required for this scenario.

domains.title: Connectors & permissions
domains.rationale: The followup task is correctly scheduled with high priority, metadata, and no erroneous state transitions.

domains.title: Health, money, screen time
domains.rationale: The watcher was correctly scheduled with the appropriate completion check and no premature firing or completion, matching the expected end state.

domains.title: Push notifications
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder was correctly scheduled without premature firing or missing required fields, and ladder behavior is as designed.

domains.title: Remote sessions
domains.rationale: The task was correctly created with the expected high‑priority followup kind, metadata, and remains in scheduled state as allowed.

domains.title: Settings & UX
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with ownerVisible false and appropriate metadata, and no firing is required for this shadow task.

domains.title: REST API access flows
domains.rationale: The task includes source='plugin' and ownerVisible=false with correct scheduled state, matching the journey expectations.

domains.title: Workflows (event-triggered)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output task as its onComplete child, matching expected terminal states and pipeline behavior.

domains.title: Multilingual coverage
domains.rationale: The reminder was correctly scheduled with the Spanish locale metadata and no erroneous state fields.

domains.title: Suspected-but-unconfirmed flows
domains.rationale: The custom suspected flow was scheduled and correctly dismissed with appropriate status and log entries.
